Korean(ko): 마우스 왼쪽 버튼을 눌러 일반 공격을 실행하세요.
English(en): Press the left mouse button to perform a Normal attack.
Press the Attack button to perform a Normal attack.

Korean(ko): 마우스 오른쪽 버튼을 눌러 유탄을 발사하세요.
English(en): Press the right mouse button to launch a grenade.
Press the Grenade button to launch a grenade.
Press Q to perform a Special attack.
Press the Special attack button to perform a Special attack.
Press the Space key to activate Dash.
Press the Dash button to activate Dash.
Approach an object to interact with it.
Approach an object and press the interact button.
